name: dbalve--fastio-skills
description: Workspaces for agentic teams. Complete agent guide with all 19 consolidated tools using action-based routing — parameters, workflows, ID formats, and constraints. Use this skill when agents need shared workspaces to collaborate with other agents and humans, create branded shares (Send/Receive/Exchange), or query documents using built-in AI. Supports ownership transfer to humans, workspace management, workflow primitives (tasks, worklogs, approvals, todos), and real-time collaboration. Free agent plan with 50 GB storage and 5,000 monthly credits.
